mcq.question: What is the internet?
mcq.correct: A global network that connects devices so they can communicate and share data
wrong: A collection of web pages and sites
Software used to access web pages
A system used to store website data

mcq.question: What is the world wide web?
mcq.correct: A collection of websites and web pages accessed using the internet
wrong: A system used to route data between networks
A method of identifying devices on a network

mcq.question: What is the difference between the internet and the world wide web?
mcq.correct: The internet connects devices, the world wide web lets you access websites
wrong: They are exactly the same thing
The world wide web connects devices
The internet is a type of website

mcq.question: Which of these is a device connected to the internet?
Which of these is part of the world wide web?
wrong: A device used to send data between networks
A number used to identify a device on a network

mcq.question: Which of these uses the internet but is not part of the world wide web?
